summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool for migrating, detecting, and running Goss test assertions with Kubernetes support and a plugin system.
concerns: Recent commits are dominated by automated session metadata commits indicating possible CI/automation noise
Untracked and staged files suggest incomplete commit hygiene
ClaudeDesktop/specs directory implies AI-generated or assisted test specifications which may lack rigorous coverage
suggestions: Resolve the build failure immediately before proceeding with feature work
Filter or disable auto-commit session metadata hooks to keep git history clean
Commit or gitignore the untracked files to stabilize the repository state
Review AI-generated specs in ClaudeDesktop/specs for completeness and edge cases
